text:
B0700_SELF_UNDRSTOD_CD B0700 Makes Self Understood Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to make themselves understood. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Understood
1=Usually understood-difficulty communicating some words or finishing
thoughts but is able to if prompted or given time
2=Sometimes understood-ability is limited to making concrete requests
3=Rarely/never understood
^=Blank(skip pattern)
91 B0800_UNDRST_OTHR_CD B0800_UNDRST_OTHR_CD B0800 Ability to
